title: TIP-1.0 Request/Response Metadata
description: Runtime metadata attached to services.Request.metadata and services.Response.metadata. See https://docs.tokenpak.ai/protocol/scope for what TIP-1.0 does and does not cover.

tip_version.description: TIP version used for this request. Matches X-TokenPak-TIP-Version header.

profile.description: Profile identifier (tip-proxy, tip-companion, tip-adapter, tip-plugin, tip-dashboard-consumer).

provider.description: Outbound provider canonical name (anthropic, openai, google, ollama, etc.). Unknown providers are allowed and emit 'unknown' per Constitution §5.3 no-over-claim rule.

model.description: Model identifier within the provider (claude-opus-4-7, gpt-5-codex, etc.).

client.description: Client tool the user is running (claude-code, cursor, aider, cline, continue, codex, custom-sdk, etc.).

session_id.description: Client-session identifier if available; used by companion journal for session-scoped state.

capabilities_negotiated.description: Capability labels negotiated with the peer (MCP capability intersection). Control-plane metadata only; data-plane requests don't negotiate.

ext.description: Namespaced extension fields per docs/protocol/extension-model.md. Core fields MUST NOT be shadowed here.
